name: Kimi (Moonshot AI)
narrative: Kimi is the AI assistant developed by Moonshot AI, one of China's most well-funded AI startups. Moonshot is less encumbered by legacy business interests than Alibaba or ByteDance, and has moved fast on long-context reasoning capabilities. Kimi reflects Moonshot's position: a nimble, compute-constrained challenger focused on technical differentiation, operating in China's regulatory environment with ambitions to compete globally.
